hooks.prompt: The tool wants to edit a file. Check if the file path in tool_input contains 'Directory.Packages.props' or 'Directory.Build.props'. If yes, block and explain these are central versioning files that affect all projects — the user must confirm explicitly before editing. Otherwise allow.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; if echo "$f" | grep -q '\.csproj$'; then dotnet build "$repo_root/BabelStudio.sln" --no-restore -v q 2>&1; fi; }
